name: Athenahealth, Inc.
lede: Athena runs three capability centers across three Indian cities. Bengaluru, Chennai and Pune, covering R&D, built over thirteen years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Athena office in India. We map three, across three cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Athenahealth, Inc. GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Athena runs 3 verified GCC centers across 3 Indian cities (Bengaluru, Chennai, Pune), covering R&D. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

titles.title: Director - Talent and Culture (US and India)

about.description: Athena's India footprint covers Bengaluru, Chennai and Pune, spanning R&D. The centers deliver IT, HR and Sales & Marketing for the group's global operations.
about.industry: Health Care Management Software, Industry-Specific Software

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all 27 decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many GCC centers does Athena operate in India?
faq.a: Athena operates 3 active Global Capability Center sites in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does Athena have GCC centers in?
faq.a: Athena's India GCC footprint spans Bengaluru, Chennai and Pune.

faq.q: What types of GCC centers does Athena run in India?
faq.a: Athena runs R&D centers in India.

faq.q: How many people work at Athena's India GCCs?
faq.a: Athena's India centers employ in the 1,000 to 5,000 range. The exact aggregate and the headcount at each site are in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads Athena's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks 27 leaders at Athena's India centers, across IT, HR and GCC leadership. Names and contact details open with a free account.

sources: company filings, LinkedIn, NASSCOM and Bamboo Reports' primary research
